text: Perimeter's clear. All sections checked.
[CALM] Quiet shift's fine by me. Gives me time to get equipment maintenance done.
Security sweep complete. Weapons checked and ready.
[TIRED] Nothing got breached. Nobody got hurt. That's a good day.
[CALM] Hull's breached. I'm securing the corridor. Get clear now.
[URGENT] Contact in the aft section. All personnel move to secure positions. Now.
Door sealed. That section's lost but the rest holds.
[CALM] Took a hit but still mobile. Still sharp.
[DEADPAN] Everyone's accounted for. That's two pieces of good news in one day.
Been on three ships that didn't make it. This one's tougher than all of them.
[SUSPICIOUS] AI protocols shifted during the firefight. Timing seems off. I'm keeping watch.
[GRIM] Lost someone today. I'll make sure it means something.
[CALM] Life support's compromised forward. I'm moving to position there. Stay alert.
[EMPHASIS] Threat confirmed. Defensive positions. Weapons free on hostile engagement.
All sections secure. No breaches, no incursions.
[CALM] I've got weapons trained on that area. Clear the corridor.
Status?
[CALM] We're holding the position. I need your support on my left.
[WARM] You kept your head when everything was chaos. Good work out there.
[CALM] There's something we need to talk about regarding security protocols. Later though.
[CURIOUS] Any sounds or movements in your section? Anything at all?
[CALM] I'm good. You should check yourself.
[REASSURING] I've fought worse odds. We can do this.
[CALM] Fear keeps you sharp. Channel it. Don't let it control you.
[CALM] Let me look at that. I can help.
[EMPHASIS] Stay focused. We're not done yet.
[SUSPICIOUS] Your concerns about the AI match what I've seen in tactical responses. Worth monitoring.
[DRY] That was the protocol. Still the protocol. Nothing's changed.
Got it. I'll adjust accordingly.
[CALM] Think clearly and move deliberately. Everything else is noise.
[WARM] You made the right call under pressure. That's all that matters.
[CALM] That was correct. I would've done the same.
[WARM] I'm glad you're here. That's not something I say lightly.
[EMPHASIS] Get to the medical bay. I'll handle this.
[PANICKED] No, you need medical attention right now. This isn't negotiable.
[TERRIFIED] Hostile contact is closing. We don't have much time. I don't know if we can hold this position.
Here. We can make this work.
[CALM] Quarters are secure. Nothing else to do today.
[TIRED] I'll keep watch if anything develops. Get some rest.
I need to check my gear. Come find me later.
[GRIM] Perimeter's locked down. I'll maintain position.
[CALM] Shift's done. Everything's secure. Rest well.
[CALM] All clear. Get some rest.
[URGENT] All hands to defensive positions. Potential incursion in forward section. Move now.
[CALM] Here's what we need to do. Follow my lead and we'll get through this.
[DRY] Threat's eliminated. That's what counted today.
I second-guessed myself. Shouldn't have. Won't again.
[PAINED] Bleeding's stopped. Wound's sealed. I can move.
[CALM] Airlock's sealed. Forward section's isolated. No spread.
[WARM] You've got good instincts. Trust them.
[CALM] I want to run defensive scenarios with you. Nothing imminent, just being ready.
You okay? Really okay?
[CURIOUS] You notice anything off in the corridors yesterday? Sounds, movements, anything?
[CALM] That checks out. I trust your assessment.
[CALM] Meal time means restocking rations and checking the weapons locker temperature.
Shift starting. Equipment check complete. Weapons loaded and ready.
[TIRED] Perimeter's secure. Nobody got hurt. Weapons still locked and loaded for next time.
[CALM] Life support systems are critical. I'm securing the corridors to minimize exposure to bad air.
[GRIM] Power situation means lights out in three sections. Switching to night-vision protocols.
[CALM] Reactor malfunction means everyone stays clear of the aft sections. That's a hard perimeter.
[GRIM] Airlock sealed. Section is lost. We hold the line here.
[SUSPICIOUS] The AI's tactical suggestions have gotten slower since the damage. Timing matters in a fight.
[WARM] The AI called that threat correctly. Saved us from an ambush. Good work.
[PAINED] Got cut. Nothing deep. Still operational. Combat effectiveness at ninety percent.
[GRIM] A crew member fell in the corridors. I was supposed to have their back. I didn't.
[PANICKED] The breach is spreading and I can't seal it fast enough. We're losing entire sections.
[TERRIFIED] Enemy contact is advancing. We're getting pushed back. I don't see how we hold this position.
[CALM] Spent the quiet hours stripping and cleaning my rifle. Meditation and maintenance.
[CURIOUS] Any strange sounds or movement reports from your section? Anything at all suspicious?
[WARM] You handled that contact by the book. Exactly how I would've done it.
[CALM] You did what you had to do. The mission came first. That's the job.
[CALM] Your assessment is correct. I trust your read on the situation.
[CALM] Keep your position. I'll monitor communications from here.
[GRIM] Hold the line. We're not retreating.
[DRY] Someone borrowed my cleaning kit. Borrowed. Without the bringing-back part.
Your mag was stowed loose. Fix it. Loose gear costs seconds. Seconds cost more.
[DEADPAN] Funny. Write it down. I'll laugh on my day off.
You talk enough for both of us. Works out. I listen enough for both of us.
Walked the cargo hold twice. Counted the shadows. Same number as yesterday. Good.
Show me your section's blind spots. Every room has two. Most people know one.
[DEADPAN] Ship's trying new ways to kill us. Points for creativity. None for execution.
[DRY] Dying's easy. Filling out the incident report after is the hard part.
Basic training, they took our watches. Learned to count time by breath. Still do it on long watches.
I remember that drop. You froze for one second, then you moved right. The second part is what I kept.
Cleaned my rifle twice tonight. It was clean the first time. That's how I know something's on my mind.
Everybody second-guesses. Difference is when. Before the fight, fine. During, never. After, briefly.
[CALM] You're still here. Gear's intact. Odds improved twice today already. Keep breathing.
[WARM] Sit. Clean something with me. Hands busy, head quiets. Old trick. Works.
[WARM] I saved you a seat at chow. Been doing it a while. Figured you'd noticed.
I don't say much. So when I say I want you around, count it double.
[WARM] Yes. Short answer. Meant long.
Power's low. Good news: I train in the dark. Bad news: so does whatever else is out here.
[CALM] Torch discipline. Short bursts, low beam. We make the batteries outlast the problem.
Thin air. Moving slow on purpose. Everything at half speed, everything still done.
Stop talking. Breathe slower. I'll watch the corridor for both of us.
[GRIM] Stood post at that door for two years. Today it did its job. Hate that it had to.
The door closed on my watch. Their name goes in my log, my handwriting. That's what I can still do.
[CONFIDENT] Fastest strip-and-reassemble on the ship. Blindfolded. Timed. Witnessed.
Give me your watch rotation tonight. You're done standing. I'm not.
Was blunt earlier. Bluntness is a tool. Wrong tool for that moment.
[DEADPAN] Going on watch. If anything eats me, avenge the rifle. It's the expensive part.
[CALM] Rack out. I've got the corridor. Nothing gets past a bored marine.
